title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on tasks like predicting drug toxicity, identifying cell types, discovering cancer drugs, and designing antibodies.
